# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses merge request title and description in build notifications and commit messages. This helps track which features are being deployed and generates automatic release notes. Include the MR title in deployment tags.
# Category: cicd_security

variables:
  DEPLOY_TAG: ""
  RELEASE_NOTES_FILE: "release_notes.md"

stages:
  - validate
  - build
  - test
  - deploy
  - notify

validate_mr:
  stage: validate
  rules:
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"
  script:
    - echo "Validating Merge Request..."
    - echo "MR Title: ${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE}"
    - echo "MR Description: ${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION}"
    - |
      if [ -z "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE" ]; then
        echo "ERROR: Merge Request title is empty. Please provide a meaningful title."
        exit 1
      fi
    - |
      if echo "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE" | grep -qE "^(feat|fix|chore|docs|refactor|test|ci|perf|style|build)\:"; then
        echo "MR title follows conventional commit format."
      else
        echo "WARNING: MR title does not follow conventional commit format (e.g., feat: add new feature)."
        echo "Recommended prefixes: feat, fix, chore, docs, refactor, test, ci, perf, style, build"
      fi
    - echo "MR IID: ${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID}"
    - echo "MR Source Branch: ${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_SOURCE_BRANCH_NAME}"
    - echo "MR Target Branch: ${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TARGET_BRANCH_NAME}"
    - echo "MR Author: ${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_ASSIGNEES}"

build:
  stage: build
  rules:
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH
  script:
    - echo "Building application..."
    - |
      if [ -n "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE" ]; then
        BUILD_LABEL="MR-${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID}: ${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE}"
      else
        BUILD_LABEL="Branch build: ${CI_COMMIT_BRANCH} - ${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}"
      fi
    - echo "Build Label: ${BUILD_LABEL}"
    - mkdir -p build
    - echo "${BUILD_LABEL}" > build/BUILD_INFO.txt
    - echo "Commit: ${CI_COMMIT_SHA}" >> build/BUILD_INFO.txt
    - echo "Pipeline: ${CI_PIPELINE_ID}" >> build/BUILD_INFO.txt
    - |
      if [ -n "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION" ]; then
        echo "Description: ${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_DESCRIPTION}" >> build/BUILD_INFO.txt
      fi
    - echo "Build completed successfully."
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - build/
    expire_in: 1 week

test:
  stage: test
  rules:
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH
  needs:
    - build
  script:
    - echo "Running tests..."
    - cat build/BUILD_INFO.txt
    - echo "Tests passed successfully."

generate_release_notes:
  stage: deploy
  rules:
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH
  script:
    - echo "Generating release notes..."
    - |
      DEPLOY_TAG="v$(date +%Y%m%d%H%M%S)-${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}"
      echo "DEPLOY_TAG=${DEPLOY_TAG}" >> deploy.env
    - |
      cat > ${RELEASE_NOTES_FILE} << 'HEADER'
      # Release Notes
      HEADER
    - echo "" >> ${RELEASE_NOTES_FILE}
    - echo "## Deployment Tag: ${DEPLOY_TAG}" >> ${RELEASE_NOTES_FILE}
    - echo "**Date:** $(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)" >> ${RELEASE_NOTES_FILE}
    - echo "**Pipeline:** ${CI_PIPELINE_URL}" >> ${RELEASE_NOTES_FILE}
    - echo "" >> ${RELEASE_NOTES_FILE}
    - echo "## Changes Included" >> ${RELEASE_NOTES_FILE}
    - echo "" >> ${RELEASE_NOTES_FILE}
    - |
      echo "Fetching merged MRs for release notes..."
      # Use GitLab API to fetch recently merged MRs into the default branch
      MERGED_MRS=$(curl --silent --header "PRIVATE-TOKEN: ${GITLAB_API_TOKEN}" \
        "${CI_API_V4_URL}/projects/${CI_PROJECT_ID}/merge_requests?state=merged&target_branch=${CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH}&order_by=updated_at&sort=desc&per_page=20" 2>/dev/null || echo "[]")

      if [ "$MERGED_MRS" != "[]" ] && [ -n "$MERGED_MRS" ]; then
        echo "$MERGED_MRS" | python3 -c "
      import sys, json
      try:
          mrs = json.load(sys.stdin)
          features = []
          fixes = []
          others = []
          for mr in mrs:
              title = mr.get('title', 'No title')
              iid = mr.get('iid', 'N/A')
              author = mr.get('author', {}).get('name', 'Unknown')
              description = mr.get('description', '') or ''
              # Truncate description for release notes
              short_desc = description[:200].replace('\n', ' ').strip()
              entry = f'- **!{iid}** {title} (by {author})'
              if short_desc:
                  entry += f'\n  > {short_desc}'
              if title.lower().startswith('feat'):
                  features.append(entry)
              elif title.lower().startswith('fix'):
                  fixes.append(entry)
              else:
                  others.append(entry)
          
          output = ''
          if features:
              output += '### Features\n\n' + '\n'.join(features) + '\n\n'
          if fixes:
              output += '### Bug Fixes\n\n' + '\n'.join(fixes) + '\n\n'
          if others:
              output += '### Other Changes\n\n' + '\n'.join(others) + '\n\n'
          print(output)
      except Exception as e:
          print(f'- Unable to parse MR data: {e}')
      " >> ${RELEASE_NOTES_FILE}
      else
        echo "- No recent merged MRs found or API token not configured." >> ${RELEASE_NOTES_FILE}
        echo "" >> ${RELEASE_NOTES_FILE}
        echo "### Commits" >> ${RELEASE_NOTES_FILE}
        git log --oneline -10 >> ${RELEASE_NOTES_FILE}
      fi
    - echo "" >> ${RELEASE_NOTES_FILE}
    - echo "---" >> ${RELEASE_NOTES_FILE}
    - echo "*Generated automatically by GitLab CI Pipeline #${CI_PIPELINE_ID}*" >> ${RELEASE_NOTES_FILE}
    - cat ${RELEASE_NOTES_FILE}
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - ${RELEASE_NOTES_FILE}
      - deploy.env
    reports:
      dotenv: deploy.env
    expire_in: 1 month

create_deployment_tag:
  stage: deploy
  rules:
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH
  needs:
    - generate_release_notes
    - build
  script:
    - echo "Creating deployment tag ${DEPLOY_TAG}..."
    - |
      # Construct tag message incorporating MR titles
      TAG_MESSAGE="Deployment ${DEPLOY_TAG}"
      TAG_MESSAGE="${TAG_MESSAGE}\n\nPipeline: ${CI_PIPELINE_URL}"
      TAG_MESSAGE="${TAG_MESSAGE}\nCommit: ${CI_COMMIT_SHA}"
    - |
      # Fetch recent MR titles for the tag annotation
      if [ -n "${GITLAB_API_TOKEN}" ]; then
        MERGED_MRS=$(curl --silent --header "PRIVATE-TOKEN: ${GITLAB_API_TOKEN}" \
          "${CI_API_V4_URL}/projects/${CI_PROJECT_ID}/merge_requests?state=merged&target_branch=${CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH}&order_by=updated_at&sort=desc&per_page=10" 2>/dev/null || echo "[]")
        
        MR_TITLES=$(echo "$MERGED_MRS" | python3 -c "
      import sys, json
      try:
          mrs = json.load(sys.stdin)
          for mr in mrs[:10]:
              title = mr.get('title', 'No title')
              iid = mr.get('iid', 'N/A')
              print(f'  - !{iid}: {title}')
      except:
          pass
      " 2>/dev/null || echo "")
        
        if [ -n "$MR_TITLES" ]; then
          TAG_MESSAGE="${TAG_MESSAGE}\n\nIncluded Merge Requests:\n${MR_TITLES}"
        fi
      fi
    - echo -e "${TAG_MESSAGE}"
    - |
      # Create the tag via GitLab API with release notes
      if [ -n "${GITLAB_API_TOKEN}" ]; then
        RELEASE_BODY=$(cat ${RELEASE_NOTES_FILE} | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.dumps(sys.stdin.read()))" | sed 's/^"//;s/"$//')
        
        # Create annotated tag
        curl --silent --request POST --header "PRIVATE-TOKEN: ${GITLAB_API_TOKEN}" \
          --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
          --data "{
            \"tag_name\": \"${DEPLOY_TAG}\",
            \"ref\": \"${CI_COMMIT_SHA}\",
            \"message\": \"$(echo -e ${TAG_MESSAGE} | sed 's/"/\\"/g')\"
          }" \
          "${CI_API_V4_URL}/projects/${CI_PROJECT_ID}/repository/tags" || echo "Tag creation via API failed, falling back to git"
        
        # Create a release associated with the tag
        curl --silent --request POST --header "PRIVATE-TOKEN: ${GITLAB_API_TOKEN}" \
          --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
          --data "{
            \"tag_name\": \"${DEPLOY_TAG}\",
            \"name\": \"Release ${DEPLOY_TAG}\",
            \"description\": ${RELEASE_BODY}
          }" \
          "${CI_API_V4_URL}/projects/${CI_PROJECT_ID}/releases" || echo "Release creation failed"
      else
        echo "WARNING: GITLAB_API_TOKEN not set. Skipping tag and release creation via API."
        echo "Set GITLAB_API_TOKEN in CI/CD variables to enable automatic tagging."
      fi
    - echo "Deployment tag ${DEPLOY_TAG} created successfully."

deploy_production:
  stage: deploy
  rules:
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH
      when: manual
  needs:
    - create_deployment_tag
    - build
    - generate_release_notes
  environment:
    name: production
    url: https://production.example.com
  script:
    - echo "Deploying to production with tag ${DEPLOY_TAG}..."
    - cat build/BUILD_INFO.txt
    - echo "Deployment tag: ${DEPLOY_TAG}"
    - |
      echo "Deploying application..."
      echo "Tag: ${DEPLOY_TAG}"
      echo "Commit: ${CI_COMMIT_SHA}"
      echo "Release notes generated at: ${RELEASE_NOTES_FILE}"
    - echo "Production deployment completed successfully."

notify_slack:
  stage: notify
  rules:
    - if: $CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH
  needs:
    - job: deploy_production
      optional: true
    - generate_release_notes
  script:
    - echo "Preparing deployment notification..."
    - |
      # Build notification message with MR details
      NOTIFICATION_TITLE="🚀 Deployment ${DEPLOY_TAG} - ${CI_PROJECT_NAME}"
      
      NOTIFICATION_BODY="*Project:* ${CI_PROJECT_NAME}\n"
      NOTIFICATION_BODY="${NOTIFICATION_BODY}*Tag:* ${DEPLOY_TAG}\n"
      NOTIFICATION_BODY="${NOTIFICATION_BODY}*Branch:* ${CI_COMMIT_BRANCH}\n"
      NOTIFICATION_BODY="${NOTIFICATION_BODY}*Commit:* ${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}\n"
      NOTIFICATION_BODY="${NOTIFICATION_BODY}*Pipeline:* ${CI_PIPELINE_URL}\n"
    - |
      # Add MR information to notification
      if [ -n "${GITLAB_API_TOKEN}" ]; then
        MERGED_MRS=$(curl --silent --header "PRIVATE-TOKEN: ${GITLAB_API_TOKEN}" \
          "${CI_API_V4_URL}/projects/${CI_PROJECT_ID}/merge_requests?state=merged&target_branch=${CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH}&order_by=updated_at&sort=desc&per_page=5" 2>/dev/null || echo "[]")
        
        MR_SECTION=$(echo "$MERGED_MRS" | python3 -c "
      import sys, json
      try:
          mrs = json.load(sys.stdin)
          if mrs:
              print('\n*Recent Merge Requests:*')
              for mr in mrs[:5]:
                  title = mr.get('title', 'No title')
                  iid = mr.get('iid', 'N/A')
                  author = mr.get('author', {}).get('name', 'Unknown')
                  web_url = mr.get('web_url', '#')
                  description = mr.get('description', '') or ''
                  short_desc = description[:100].replace('\n', ' ').strip()
                  line = f'• <{web_url}|!{iid}> {title} _(by {author})_'
                  if short_desc:
                      line += f'\n   {short_desc}...'
                  print(line)
      except Exception as e:
          print(f'Unable to fetch MR data: {e}')
      " 2>/dev/null || echo "")
        
        if [ -n "$MR_SECTION" ]; then
          NOTIFICATION_BODY="${NOTIFICATION_BODY}${MR_SECTION}"
        fi
      fi
    - echo -e "Notification content:"
    - echo -e "${NOTIFICATION_TITLE}"
    - echo -e "${NOTIFICATION_BODY}"
    - |
      # Send to Slack if webhook URL is configured
      if [ -n "${SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL}" ]; then
        PAYLOAD=$(python3 -c "
      import json
      title = '''${NOTIFICATION_TITLE}'''
      body = '''${NOTIFICATION_BODY}'''
      payload = {
          'text': title,
          'blocks': [
              {
                  'type': 'header',
                  'text': {
                      'type': 'plain_text',
                      'text': title
                  }
              },
              {
                  'type': 'section',
                  'text': {
                      'type': 'mrkdwn',
                      'text': body
                  }
              },
              {
                  'type': 'actions',
                  'elements': [
                      {
                          'type': 'button',
                          'text': {
                              'type': 'plain_text',
                              'text': 'View Pipeline'
                          },
                          'url': '${CI_PIPELINE_URL}'
                      },
                      {
                          'type': 'button',
                          'text': {
                              'type': 'plain_text',
                              'text': 'View Release Notes'
                          },
                          'url': '${CI_PROJECT_URL}/-/releases/${DEPLOY_TAG}'
                      }
                  ]
              }
          ]
      }
      print(json.dumps(payload))
      ")
        
        curl --silent --request POST \
          --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
          --data "${PAYLOAD}" \
          "${SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL}" && echo "Slack notification sent." || echo "Failed to send Slack notification."
      else
        echo "SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL not configured. Skipping Slack notification."
      fi

notify_mr_comment:
  stage: notify
  rules:
    - if: $CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE == "merge_request_event"
  script:
    - echo "Posting build status comment to MR !${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID}..."
    - |
      COMMENT_BODY="## 🔄 Pipeline Status Update\n\n"
      COMMENT_BODY="${COMMENT_BODY}**MR Title:** ${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TITLE}\n"
      COMMENT_BODY="${COMMENT_BODY}**Pipeline:** [#${CI_PIPELINE_ID}](${CI_PIPELINE_URL})\n"
      COMMENT_BODY="${COMMENT_BODY}**Status:** ✅ Pipeline completed\n"
      COMMENT_BODY="${COMMENT_BODY}**Commit:** \`${CI_COMMIT_SHORT_SHA}\`\n\n"
      COMMENT_BODY="${COMMENT_BODY}### Build Information\n"
      COMMENT_BODY="${COMMENT_BODY}- Source Branch: \`${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_SOURCE_BRANCH_NAME}\`\n"
      COMMENT_BODY="${COMMENT_BODY}- Target Branch: \`${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_TARGET_BRANCH_NAME}\`\n\n"
      COMMENT_BODY="${COMMENT_BODY}*This deployment will be tagged with the MR title upon merge.*"
    - |
      if [ -n "${GITLAB_API_TOKEN}" ]; then
        ESCAPED_BODY=$(echo -e "${COMMENT_BODY}" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.dumps(sys.stdin.read()))")
        
        curl --silent --request POST --header "PRIVATE-TOKEN: ${GITLAB_API_TOKEN}" \
          --header "Content-Type: application/json" \
          --data "{\"body\": ${ESCAPED_BODY}}" \
          "${CI_API_V4_URL}/projects/${CI_PROJECT_ID}/merge_requests/${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID}/notes" \
          && echo "Comment posted to MR !${CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID}" \
          || echo "Failed to post comment to MR"
      else
        echo "GITLAB_API_TOKEN not configured. Skipping MR comment."
      fi
